common.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

create.title: Start a new deal
create.subtitle: Choose your role to begin a protected transaction.

status.awaiting_both_approval: Waiting for both sides to approve

invite.preview_title: You've been invited to a BothSafe deal
invite.share_warning: Anyone with this link can join the deal as the other party. Share it only with the intended counterparty.

confirmation.confirm_received_warning: Once confirmed, the seller will be paid. This can't be undone.

role.ask: Are you the buyer or the seller?

link.private_warning: Keep this link private. Anyone with it can act as you on this deal.
link.share_this: Share this link with the other party to join.

status.ready_for_payment: Your deal is ready for payment.

error.deal_create_failed: We couldn't create the deal. Please try again.

help.escrow_explain: BothSafe holds the payment until the buyer confirms the item. Then we release it to the seller.

auth.invalid_signup_data: Check your email and password and try again.
auth.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
auth.role_forbidden: You can't perform this action on this deal.
auth.admin_required: Admin access is required for this action.

deal.missing_required_fields: Some required fields are still empty.
deal.invalid_field: One of the fields has an invalid value.
deal.locked_after_payment: This deal is locked after payment. Contact support to change it.
deal.approval_not_allowed: Approvals aren't allowed in this state.
deal.invalid_state: This action isn't available in the current deal state.

invite.invalid: This invite link is invalid or expired.
invite.consumed: This invite has already been used.

join.invalid_field: Check the join form fields and try again.

wallet.insufficient_balance: Wallet balance isn't enough to cover this deal.
wallet.currency_mismatch: Wallet currency doesn't match the deal currency.
wallet.invalid_deal_state: Wallet payment isn't available in this deal state.
wallet.transaction_failed: Wallet transaction failed. No funds were moved.

payment.khqr_unavailable: KHQR is unavailable right now. Please try again.
payment.empty_receipt: Add a paid amount or upload a receipt.
payment.invalid_state: This action isn't available in the current state.
payment.invalid_reason: Provide a rejection reason between 1 and 500 characters.

shipping.empty_proof: Add tracking info, a package photo, or a delivery receipt.
shipping.invalid_state: Shipping proof can't be submitted in this state.

confirmation.invalid_state: Confirmation isn't available in this state.

dispute.invalid_state: Disputes can't be opened in this state.
dispute.duplicate_active: There's already an open dispute on this deal.

withdrawal.invalid_status: Withdrawal isn't in a state where this action is allowed.

storage.invalid_file: That file isn't accepted. Use a JPG, PNG, or PDF up to 10 MB.

rate.exceeded: Too many requests. Please slow down and try again.

binance.unavailable: Binance Pay is unavailable right now.
binance.invalid_signature: Binance Pay signature could not be verified.

idempotency.mismatch: This request was already processed with different parameters.

validation.invalid_field: One of the fields has an invalid value.
validation.out_of_range: Value is out of the allowed range.

notifications.counterparty_joined: The other party joined the deal.
notifications.both_approved: Both sides approved. The deal is ready for payment.
notifications.payment_proof_uploaded: A payment proof was submitted for review.
notifications.payment_verified: Payment verified. The seller can prepare the item.
notifications.seller_should_ship: Payment is in escrow. Please ship the item.
notifications.dispute_opened: A dispute was opened on this deal.
notifications.payout_released: Funds were released to the seller wallet.
